Container.Name: mcp-searxng
Container.Overview: MCP bridge for SearXNG that exposes searxng_web_search and web_url_read tools to Claude Code and other MCP clients. [br] [br]This is the iknox fork with: [br]- Mozilla Readability content extraction (strips nav/footer/sidebar) [br]- Page metadata extraction (title, author, date as YAML) [br]- Two-pass reading support (readHeadings → section) [br]- Default 8000-char cap on bare fetches to save tokens [br]- Content-Length HEAD check that blocks pages over 5MB [br] [br]Connects to a SearXNG instance over the local-ai network.
Container.Description: MCP bridge that wraps a SearXNG JSON API into Model Context Protocol tools (searxng_web_search + web_url_read). Claude Code, Claude Desktop, or any MCP client connects via HTTP at port PORT. The SEARXNG_URL env var points at your SearXNG container on the local-ai network. [br] [br]This replaces the npx/node stdio invocation — run it as a persistent HTTP service on castle and point your MCP client at http://castle:PORT/mcp.

Config.Name: HTTP Port
Config.Description: HTTP port the MCP server listens on. Set your MCP client to connect to http://castle:PORT/mcp.

Config.Name: MCP HTTP Port
Config.Description: Internal — tells the app to run in HTTP mode. Must match the container port above.

Config.Name: SearXNG URL
Config.Description: URL of the SearXNG JSON API. Use the container name if both are on the local-ai network.

Config.Name: User Agent
Config.Description: Optional User-Agent string for URL fetching. Leave blank for the default.

Config.Name: Allow Private URLs
Config.Description: Set to true to allow fetching private/local IPs (off by default for security).

Config.Name: Hardening
Config.Description: Disable to skip private-IP filtering and TLS enforcement.
